name: Larrainvial Asset Management ADM GE- FI Larrainvial Opportunity Inmobiliaria Fund
summary: Larrainvial Asset Management ADM GE- FI Larrainvial Opportunity Inmobiliaria Fund invests in real estate opportunities. Larrainvial Asset Management ADM GE manages the fund. The fund seeks to generate returns through investments in real estate properties or related assets.
